{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe modified the Security event log file path to a non-standard name ('Not-Important-Log.evtx'), which is a common technique for evading detection or clearing logs. While svchost.exe legitimately manages system services, this specific modification to a critical log file is highly unusual and indicative of malicious intent.",
  "indicators": [
    "event log modification",
    "security log redirection",
    "evasion",
    "svchost.exe unusual activity",
    "non-standard log file name"
  ]
}
